prompt:
Create a NEW Muha Meds 'How to Enter' giveaway poster, FRESH render (do NOT edit reference 1 — use it ONLY for layout reference). Aspect ratio 4:5 vertical / 2560×3200. Aesthetic: cinematic red/gold/cream/black palette of REFERENCE 2 (5-day countdown poster) — wet-Miami-pavement-at-night, warm amber/red atmospheric glow, deep blacks, gold star/border accents, condensed cream serif lettering, gold cursive script for accents. NO Vice-City synthwave pink/teal neons.

IMPORTANT: do NOT draw any decorative border frame around the perimeter. Edge-to-edge bleed.

Layout (based on REFERENCE 1 brief, adapted for 4:5):
- Top-center: Muha 'M' gold logo from REFERENCE 3 (use as-is, gold metallic), with row of small gold stars beneath as divider.
- 'HOW TO ENTER THE MUHA MEMBERS' cream subhead between two horizontal gold rules.
- Hero headline: 'GIVEAWAY' big bold cream condensed serif, 'Vice City' gold cursive script underneath.
- Mid-left callout: '$25,000 CASH PRIZE + ALL-NEW DODGE CHALLENGER' stacked cream/gold. CRITICAL — no 'SRT'.
- Right of callout: large hero red Dodge Challenger EXACTLY matching REFERENCE 2. No prominent 'SRT' badge.
- Stylized 'Muha Members' wordmark cream/gold with flourish, then 'Your journey STARTS HERE' gold cursive.
- Three numbered steps STACKED vertically (each on its own row), each paired with a realistic black-bezel iPhone mockup. CRITICAL ORIENTATION + UNIFORMITY — every phone is a tall PORTRAIT iPhone (taller than it is wide, roughly 9:19.5 aspect, like a real iPhone held upright). DO NOT render the phones as horizontal rectangles, landscape tablets, or wide cards. They must look like normal upright phones. All three mockups MUST be IDENTICAL in size, width, height, framing, angle, and perspective. Same exact phone rendered three times with different screen content. Align them in a tidy vertical column with consistent spacing. Show each phone straight-on (no varying tilts).
  Gold 1/2/3 numerals, cream all-caps labels:
   • Step 1: '1 GO TO MORE AND TAP "RAFFLES"'
   • Step 2: '2 SELECT "GTA RAFFLE"'
   • Step 3: '3 TAP "SCAN RAFFLE TICKET"'
  Phone screens:
   • Phone 1: render REFERENCE 4 faithfully.
   • Phone 2: render REFERENCE 5 faithfully.
   • Phone 3: render REFERENCE 6 faithfully BUT with ONE text substitution — title 'Scan product code' must instead read 'Scan Raffle Ticket' in same font/weight/color/position. Keep all other UI bit-faithful.
- Lower-RIGHT: a CLEAN EMPTY QR PLACEHOLDER — perfectly square FLAT pure-white box, EXACTLY 800×800 px (≈31% of 2560-wide canvas). PURE solid white interior — NO text, labels, 'SCAN' tag, QR, dots, patterns, brackets, corner marks. Only thin warm gold outside-edge outline + soft drop shadow BEHIND + faint warm outer glow BEHIND. Interior 100% empty white.
- Above and to the LEFT of the placeholder (OUTSIDE it): gold cursive 'Scan to Find Out!' callout with curved gold arrow POINTING AT the placeholder. Small gold crown accent above the cursive.
- Bottom strip: small cream disclaimer.

Ultra-sharp render. NO border frame. ALL THREE iPhones MUST BE IDENTICAL IN SIZE AND ANGLE. Callout reads 'DODGE CHALLENGER' (no 'SRT'). Step 3 says 'SCAN RAFFLE TICKET' in BOTH poster label AND phone screen.
